Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm glad that you're in good health.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Our guests are residents of the dorm, I presume.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'm sorry for bringing such a crowd.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I heard you told them about the incident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Why did you hide it for so long?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I've told you time and again. None of the blame is yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}"Two in harmony surpasses one in perfection."[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}That has been our guiding principle since the {f 0 1 33}Kirijo Family{f 0 1 27} separated from the {f 0 1 33}Nanjo Group{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You must learn to trust in others, Mitsuru.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}There are things in this world that cannot be accomplished alone, no matter how many sacrifices you make.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You accessed our database, didn't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That brings me to my next question. Why didn't you ask me directly, instead of using this trip as an excuse?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I have no intention of concealing the truth from them. I've made preparations to disclose everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}There's a girl named Takeba in your group, correct?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}For her to awaken to her power... It must be fate.[n]{f 1 1}
